titleStmt.title: SII 26.416: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 416. (A.R. No. 395 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Māṟavarman Tribhº Vīrapāṇḍyadēva: Year 15, Dhanus (Mārgaḻi), ba. 8, Saturday, Hastam = 1348 A.D., December 13, f.d.t. ·65, f.d.n. ·60.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of land as tax-free tirunāmattukkāṇi by sale for 62 Aṉṟāḍu Naṟpaṇam to the temple of the god Tiruppulippagavar of Śṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Rājarāja vaḷanāḍu by the Brāhmaṇa Ātrayaṉ Nārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭaṉ Malaipperumāḻ Aruṇagiri-bhaṭṭaṉ and Tēvappiḷḷai of the same place. The names and boundaries of the various pieces of lands comprising the gift are given in detail. One of the channels forming the boundary of a particular piece of land is called Kōpperumjiṅgaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmar tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 vatu dhanusunāyaṟṟu Apara
pakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ rājarājavaḷaṉāṭṭumalāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmateyam
ciṟṟiṅkūr Uṭaiyār tiruppulippakavar nāyaṉār koyil Ātitāsa caṇṭecura tevaṟku Ivūr brāhmaṇaril Ātṛyaṉ nārā
yaṇapaṭṭaṉ malaipperumāḷ Aruṇakiripaṭṭaṉum tevappiḷḷaiyum Ivviruvarom kāṇivilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta pari
cāvatu Uṭaiyār tiruppulippakavanāyaṉāṟku tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟa nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷ pūtāṉa Iṟaiyili Āṉa
vaṭapāṟkellai tiruppulippakavanallūr Ūravar vilaikoṇṭa taṭṭār vaṭṭattukkut teṟkkum melpāṟkellai kopperumciṅkaṉ kā
lukku kiḻakkum teṉpāṟkkellai rumakālukku vaṭakkum kiḻpāṟkellai pāṭakattukku nirpāykiṟa vāykkālukku meṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku
Uṭpaṭṭa tiruttu Eṉṟupoki Uṭpaṭṭa Oḻukiṉpaṭi kuḻi 2 1000 4 100 9 10 6vum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṇṇikkālukku teṟkum melpāṟkellai talaipāṭakattukku taṇ
ṇīr pāykiṟa vākkālukku kiḻakkum teṉpāṟkellai tiruppulippakavanallūr Ūravar vilaikoṇṭa māppaṉukku vaṭakkum kiḻpāṟkellai ṉāyaṉār
tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyili mayāvācu vaṭṭattukku meṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa caṭaiyaṉ meṭu ku 100 8 10 2 m Āṟṟukku meṟkuvatikku
meṟkuvatikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai Aimperuṅkālukku teṟkum melpāṟkellai vaḷabhaveṭṭum vīraṉkuṇṭilukku kiḻakkum kiḻpāṟkellai kīḻai Aracaṭai
kku meṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa vaṇṇaṉ kuṇṭil 3 100 6 10 4 Aracaṉ cey kuḻi 3 100 7 10 6 m paṭṭapaḷḷai mutaliyār pūtāṉam vaṭapāṟkellai vaḷaha veṭ
ṭuvāṉ kuṇṭilukku teṟkkum melpāṟkellai kaṭampaṉukku kiḻakku n=taṉpāṟkellai Āṟumāvukku nirpāyikiṟa vāykālukku vaṭakkum kiḻpāṟkellai ca
kka koḷmuṭokku meṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nāvitaṉ kuṇṭil ku 5 100 4 10 5 m Iṅkuviṭṭa teṟkku kallipoṭakattukku vaṭapāṟkellai kaṇ
ṇi kālukku teṟkum meṟpāṟkellai melaikkallipoṭakattu kiḻakkum teṉpāṟkellai mā(m)marattukku vaṭakkum kiḻpāṟkkellai periyapaṭappaikku meṟkum
Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭa ku 3 100 6 10 6 m Āka kuḻi 1000 5 100 4 10 6m Āyirattu Aiññūṟṟu nāṟpattu Āṟum ṉāl kuḻi 3 100 2nta kiḻaraikkum viṟṟukkuṭuttu koṇṭu Aṉṟāṭu
naṟpaṇam 6 10 2 (1/2)paṇam Aṟupattu Iraṇṭume vilaikku viṟṟu vilaiprāmāṇam paṇṇi kuṭuttom kṛdiśaṇḍeśvaratevarkku Aruṇakiripaṭṭaṉum tevappiḷḷaiyum Iviruva
rom Iṉṉilattukku paṇṭārattil varum kaṭamai kaṭamai Eṟpeṟpaṭṭaṉavum nāṅkaḷ Iṟuttu Iṟaiili Ināyanārkku Iṟaiiliyāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Iviruvarom Aṛūtrayaṉ
nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ tiruvaṇṇāmalai perumāḷ Eḻuttu Ivai tevappiḷḷai Eḻuttu śrīmāheśvara rakṣai .§
Digital edition of SII 26.416 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
